acceptance.baseline: EXCLUSIVE_PROCESS allowed without a training role; mode-set failures ignored; metadata lookup preceded watcher
acceptance.after: EXCLUSIVE_PROCESS requires explicit role=training; nvidia-smi failure exits nonzero; watcher starts before 1s/2s bounded metadata lookup

acceptance.baseline: Missing positions raised ValueError or empty players produced zero-player success
acceptance.after: Returns status=degraded with typed reason missing_player_positions and no rallies

acceptance.baseline: main with unrelated existing dirty changes
acceptance.after: main; no commit or staged changes; unrelated work untouched
acceptance.target: No commits and no unrelated changes
